channel.title: Manoj Kumar - Graduate and Postgraduate Course Portfolio
channel.description: Practice-oriented courses and teaching resources for Business Management and Engineering.

item.title: Agentic AI in Supply Chain
item.description: Autonomous agents for resilient and intelligent supply chains.

item.title: AI for Business
item.description: AI concepts and practical applications for business leaders.

item.title: AI for Manufacturing Engineering
item.description: AI techniques for smart and efficient manufacturing systems.

item.title: Business Analytics
item.description: Data-driven insights for strategic and operational decision-making.

item.title: Business Science
item.description: Models and methods for solving complex business problems.

item.title: Data-Driven Decision Making
item.description: From data to decisions with confidence and clarity.

item.title: Digital Transformation for Managers
item.description: Lead change and innovation in the digital era.

item.title: Operations Analytics
item.description: Optimise operations through analytics and modelling.
